channel.title: 2026-03-18 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-18 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Measuring Entanglement Without Local Addressing in Quantum Many-Body Simulators via Spiral Quantum State Tomography
item.description:
📚 PRX Quantum
👤 Giacomo Marmorini, Takeshi Fukuhara, and Daisuke Yamamoto
Author(s): Giacomo Marmorini, Takeshi Fukuhara, and Daisuke Yamamoto A new approach to quantum state tomography, suitable for platforms where local control is difficult, can reconstruct quantum states with high accuracy and efficiency. [PRX Quantum 7, 010355] Published Wed Mar 18, 2026
